title: Build native_sim Meshtastic app-compat test harness
description:
Build native_sim Meshtastic app-compat test harness (NO HARDWARE REQUIRED).

## Context
MeshCore harness (9c4y.10) is the template - that used native_sim ztests with
generated vectors from test/vectors/meshcore_app_compat.json.

## Implementation

1. **Vector generator**: Create python script to generate test vectors from
   spec/meshtastic-app-compat.md and test/vectors/meshtastic_app_compat.json:
   - ToRadio protobuf bytes for each supported request type
   - Expected FromRadio protobuf bytes
   - Expected LICHEN local interface calls
   
2. **Codec ztest** (lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec):
   - Decode ToRadio → internal request struct
   - Encode FromRadio from internal response struct
   - Byte-for-byte match against vectors
   - Malformed/truncated/oversized rejection
   - Unknown packet type handling
   
3. **Adapter ztest** (lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter):
   - Feed ToRadio bytes via mock BLE NUS characteristic
   - Verify FromRadio bytes match expected
   - Verify LICHEN local interface calls (mock the LICHEN side)
   - Test connect/init sequence (WantConfigId, MyInfo, Config*, etc)
   - Test node info/status/config reads
   - Test text message ingress → LICHEN send
   - Test LICHEN receive → FromRadio egress
   - Test unsupported commands → explicit errors
   - Test queue limits and backpressure
   
4. **Build commands**:
   ```bash
   west build -p always -b native_sim lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec      -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen
   west build -t run
   
   west build -p always -b native_sim lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter      -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen
   west build -t run
   
   west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec      -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter      -p native_sim --inline-logs
   ```

## NOT in scope
- Real BLE stack (mocked at NUS characteristic level)
- Real LoRa radio (mocked LICHEN interface)
- Hardware flash (use RAM or simulated flash)

## Acceptance criteria
- west twister passes on native_sim
- Tests fail if handlers are bypassed
- Tests fail if raw Meshtastic RF path is accidentally used
- CI-ready commands documented in notes
notes:
EC2 validation complete (2026-07-11). All native_sim tests pass on Linux ARM64 (lichen-grinder-setup i-09cb0819a3fcdb7c7):
- meshtastic_codec: 32/32 tests PASS
- meshtastic_adapter: 82/82 tests PASS  
- meshtastic_ble: 13/13 tests PASS
- meshtastic_gateway_adapter: 81/81 tests PASS
Total: 208/208 tests passed on native_sim/native/64.
Environment: Zephyr 3.7.0, GCC 11.5.0, CMake 3.30.0.
Minor fix applied: removed unused LINK_LOCAL_PREFIX/ULA_PREFIX constants in router.c to resolve -Werror=unused-const-variable.
